name: Arizer Silicone Hose / Tubing
summary: Arizer Silicone Hose / Tubing — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: This Silicone Hose, designed for use with Arizer XQ2, Extreme Q, and V-Tower vaporisers, measures 9 ft (274.32 cm) long, making it convenient to use from any distance. Crafted from premium food-grade silicone, it meets the highest safety standards to ensure compatibility with your Arizer desktop vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
